title: Preserve independent Krea2 reference token grids
description: The delegated patch resizes reference latents to the target grid, unlike the canonical edit implementation which packs each reference at its own spatial grid. Donut additionally center-crops its patch source to target geometry. Evaluate replacing or correcting the upstream patch to avoid stretched/cropped reference conditioning.

title: Apply Differential Diffusion to Face Detailer edit model
description: With edit_mode, a distinct Identity-LoRA edit_model, noise_mask enabled, and noise_mask_feather>0, DonutFaceDetailer applies/checks DifferentialDiffusion on the unused base model before selecting edit_model. Patch the actual sampling model so soft mask feathering receives denoise_mask_function.
close_reason: Implemented with focused tests and live ComfyUI API verification

title: Handle batched Krea2 grounding per output item
description: Edit mode forwards an IMAGE batch as one grounded image argument while source/target latents remain batched. Verify tokenizer batch semantics and create per-item conditioning to prevent cross-item semantic grounding leakage.

title: Enforce max_faces after final face refinement
description: DonutFaceDetailer limits bbox SEGS before SAM/segm refinement. Segmentation override can replace the capped list entirely, while zero-mask SAM rejections can consume slots and discard valid smaller faces. Finalize/refine SEGS first, remove empty masks, then sort and cap; detect references after final targets so override results cannot index an empty reference list.
close_reason: Implemented with focused tests and live ComfyUI API verification

title: Patch secondary edit models only in multi-model mode
description: edit_mode patches model_2/model_3 before mode dispatch. Stale optional models can fail or allocate memory during simple/advanced runs where they are unused.
close_reason: Implemented and verified with unit tests and a live 1024x1536 Krea2 edit workflow

title: Use clean timestep modulation for Krea2 edit references
description: The delegated comfyui-krea2edit forward modulates clean reference tokens with the active denoising timestep. The canonical Ostris edit implementation computes tvec0 from timestep zero for references and uses active tvec only for text/target tokens. Donut inherits this behavior from the installed patch.
close_reason: Implemented and verified with unit tests and a live 1024x1536 Krea2 edit workflow

title: Align DonutFaceDetailer with current Impact hook lifecycle
description: DonutFaceDetailer calls unsupported touch_latent and misuses post_detection on decoded IMAGE, while omitting current Impact post_upscale/post_encode/custom sampler-noise/set_steps/cycle_latent/pre_ksample/pre_decode/post_decode lifecycle. Current DETAILER_HOOK implementations can crash or be silently ignored.

title: Preserve explicit edit target geometry and latent metadata
description: DonutSampler edit_mode replaces the required latent with a source-derived ~1-MiP zero latent, discarding caller-selected output dimensions, batch_index, and noise_mask. Add explicit target controls or preserve compatible latent metadata and geometry.
close_reason: Implemented and verified with unit tests and a live 1024x1536 Krea2 edit workflow

title: Propagate DonutSampler sampling failures
description: Simple, advanced, and multi-model sampling catch runtime failures and return the input/partial latent, which in edit mode is often the zero target. Downstream nodes treat blank or partial output as successful execution.

title: Fix multi-face Face Detailer sequencing and alpha output
description: Overlapping faces still crop from stale original pixels instead of progressively enhanced_img, and cropped_enhanced_alpha still returns RGB without mask alpha. Shared seeds remain the backward-compatible default; an optional per-face seed toggle was implemented separately.

title: Audit DonutSampler edit mode for correctness bugs
description: Compare the local DonutSampler edit-mode implementation with lbouaraba/comfyui-krea2edit, focusing on correctness regressions and custom upscale behavior. Report reproducible bugs with file/line references.
close_reason: Audit completed; actionable bugs recorded as child follow-up issues.

title: Reject incompatible partial-denoise controls in edit mode
description: Edit mode always samples an empty zero target, but accepts denoise<1, disabled noise, and advanced start steps. These controls assume an initialized target latent and can produce blank/under-noised output or immediately return zeros.
close_reason: Implemented and verified with unit tests and a live 1024x1536 Krea2 edit workflow

title: Restore training-matched Krea2 source modulation
description: The A/B workflow shows Donut output has pHash distance 30 and SSIM 0.084 versus the source, while upstream Krea2Edit scores 6 and 0.911. Donut's zero-timestep reference modulation diverges from the Identity Edit LoRA's training-matched upstream active-timestep block path. Restore upstream modulation while retaining target geometry and wrapper fixes, then verify against the supplied A/B workflow.
close_reason: Restored upstream active-timestep block path; exact A/B improved Donut from pHash 30/SSIM 0.084 to pHash 6/SSIM 0.920 and matched upstream at pHash 0/SSIM 0.989

title: Apply dynamic CFG by diffusion step
description: Dynamic CFG advances in CFGGuider.predict_noise, which is a denoiser evaluation hook. Multi-evaluation samplers consume multiple CFG entries per sigma interval and reach cfg_end early; advanced partial sampling also starts at CFG index zero instead of start_at_step.

title: Implement dynamic CFG in multi-model sampler
description: Multi-model mode computes a per-step CFG curve but passes only phase_cfg_values[0] as a fixed scalar to common_ksampler, so CFG is constant within each model phase.

title: Audit Face Detailer Krea2 edit integration
description: Verify DonutFaceDetailer edit mode applies Krea2Edit correctly for partial-denoise face crops, Identity Edit LoRA routing, reference-face extraction, masks/padding, multiple faces, max_faces, and wrapper lifecycle. Compare against upstream comfyui-krea2edit and current ComfyUI/Impact Pack APIs.
close_reason: Audit completed. Core Krea2 edit application is correct and a real workflow succeeded; four actionable Face Detailer follow-up bugs were recorded.
